headline: CI/CD Pipeline
description: CI/CD automates software delivery: Continuous Integration (merge frequently, auto-test), Continuous Delivery (auto-deploy to staging), Continuous Deployment (auto-deploy to production). Core principle: every commit triggers pipeline → build → test → deploy. Reduces integration pain and speeds feedback loops.

citation.name: Continuous Delivery: Reliable Software Releases (2025 Updated Edition)
citation.author: Humble J., Farley D.

citation.name: CI/CD and DevOps Maturity: A 2025 Industry Survey
citation.author: multiple
